roa.docketEntryComment: Order to CA DEPT OF CORRECTIONS AND REHABILATIONS RE: SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM FOR CONFIDENTIAL FILE
DEFT BRIEF & EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF RESENTENCING PC1170(D) FILED
ORDER FOR TELEPHONE OR VIDEO COURT APPEARANCE FILED
STIPULATION BY PARTIES TO CONTINUE MATTER FROM 110821 TO 011022
DA MOT RESENTENCE PURSUANT PC 1170(D)(1) FILED
DEFT DECLARATION AND CONFLICT WAIVER FILED
PPL MOT TO RE-SENTENCE FILED

/CAL RESENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(D)/ /DEF APPEARS VIA ZOOM FROM MULEREEK STATE PRISON (CDC #K20286)/CTORD:GUILTY FINDING ON COUNT 1 SET ASIDEAND MURDER CONVICTION VACATED & DISMISSED/X:COURT FINDS THE DEFENDANT GUILTY OF THE LESSER INCLUDED OFFENSE OF  COUNT 1, PC 192(A), VOLUNTARY MANSLAUGHTER AND RESENTENCES THE DEFENDANT AS FOLLOWS:/CH3:SP 11Y:U/ENH:CH1:TYPE12022,4PC:TI 3Y:CS/X:SENTENCE AS TO COUNT 2 REMAINS AS PREVIOUSLY IMPOSEDAND IS STAYED PURSUANT TO PC 654,/X:TOTAL STATE PRISON = 14 YEARS,/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED IN THE AMOUNT TO BE CALCULATED BY CDCR/2933,1(C)/CTORD:SENTENCE DEEMED SERVED/DEF:WAIVES ANY EXCESS CREDITS TO THEEXTENT OF ALLOWING A STANDARD PAROLE SUPERVISION PERIOD/X:FINES, FEES ANDVICTIM RESTITUTION REMAIN AS PREVIOUSLY ORDERED,/X:IT IS THE COURT'S REQUEST THAT DEFENDANT BE HOUSED AT THE PHATT CHANCE COMMUNITY SERVICES PROGRAMOR WITH FAMILY,/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)//PAROLE70/PARDATE:WITHIN 24 HOURS OF RELEASE FROM CUSTODY/PAR70/

/CAL PC 1170(D) PETITON FOR RESENTENCE/DEF IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM FROM MULEREEK STATE PRISON (CDCR# K20286)/X:ALSO PRESENT IN COURT IS ROBERT REYFF ON BEHALF OF THE CDCR,/X: PROTECTIVE ORDER REGARDING CONFIDENTIAL DOCUMENTSPRODUCED BY CDCR FILED,/X:VICTIM IMPACT STATEMENT READ ONTO THE RECORD BYTHE PEOPLE,/X:PETITION FOR RESENTENCING IS GRANTED,/

/CAL:POSSIBLE RELEASE OF REDACTED DOCUMENTS/DAWT/X:FURTHER REDACTION OF DOCUMENTS IS REQUIRED,/X:SAID DOCUMENTS, BOTH REDACTED AND UNREDACTED, ARE IN POSSESSION OF THE CDCR AND TO BE DEALT WITH EX PARTE,/X:HEARING DATE OF03-14-22 IS CONFIRMED,/

/CAL: PC 1170(D) PETITION FOR RESENTENCE/DEF:APPEARS VIA ZOOM FROM MULE CREEK STATE PRISON, CDCR# K20286/X:ALSO PRESENT IN COURT IS DENISE YATES, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL,/X:PORTION OF SUBPOENAED RECORDS ARE RELEASED TO MS,YATES/CTORD:CDCR RETURN REDACTED DOCUMENTS FOR POSSIBLE RELEASE WITH PROTECTIVE ORDER IN PLACE/X:ORDER FOR TELEPHONE OR VIDEO COURT APPEARANCE FILED,/CONT/
/CAL:TO SET DA PETITION FOR RESENTENCE PURSUANT TO PC1170(D), CDC #K20286//DEF:APPEARS VIA ZOOM FROM MULE CREEK STATE PRISON/CONTD:HEARING ON DA PC1170(D) PETITION FOR RESENTENCE/DOP/
